⚠️☠️ CRITICAL WARNING ☠️⚠️
★ RTX 5090 EDITION — NOW WITH 5× THE OVERDRAW ★

The following payload has been carefully "optimized" to actually challenge a 5090.

1. Spawns 2× CPU-count background workers (50k iterations each loop).
2. WebGL: 1500 overdraw passes/frame at 4× supersampled resolution, with 1500-iter Mandelbrot + 8-octave fBm + 64-step raymarched SDF per fragment.
3. Stacks 50 backdrop-filter layers to obliterate the GPU compositor.
4. Adds 600 spinning DOM nodes, a cursor trail, three canvases, and Comic Sans.
5. Three.js: 1500 high-poly PBR meshes (~750M triangles), 32 shadow-casting lights with 2K shadow maps + 8K directional sun, full glass+iridescence+sheen materials, 500k animated particles, 4-pass multi-view rendering.
6. Streams infinite self-replicating LLM-style text with 64 chained trig ops per character for color computation.
7. Leaks ~256 MB/sec RAM + ~16 MB/sec VRAM via retained typed arrays, GL textures, closures, and detached DOM. 32GB system OOMs in ~2 minutes.
8. YOUR FANS WILL ACHIEVE LIFTOFF
